data.title: GitHub offers organization-level metrics in public preview for Copilot, providing admins visibility without enterprise access.
data.description: The public preview of GitHub Copilot now includes organization-level usage metrics, providing org admins with direct visibility into usage data without the need for enterprise-level access. This feature allows organizations to track important numbers and gain insights into their Copilot usage at a more granular level.

data.title: Dmitry Druzhinsky sees Olympic arena as space for Kazakhstan and Ukraine to overcome challenges. 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan and Cortina d'Ampezzo symbolize renewal of global sport. Games are more than a race for medals, representing resilience and strategic sports development.
data.description: The 2026 Winter Olympics held in Milan and Cortina d'Ampezzo stand as a prime example of the revitalization of international sports, illustrating that the Games extend beyond mere medal pursuits. The event, which took place in February 2026, showcased resilience, character, and the deliberate fostering of national sports. These Olympics signified a significant milestone for global sports, emphasizing values and strategic sports development.

data.title: Antier launches white-label crypto exchange for UAE & MENA, VARA-compliant, targets financial institutions.
data.description: In recent news from New Delhi on February 21, 2026, leading company Antier has introduced a white label crypto exchange software that is VARA-compliant. This software is specifically tailored for financial institutions looking to penetrate the regulated digital-asset markets in the UAE and the broader MENA region. Aligned with Dubai's Virtual Asset Regulatory standards, this software provides a solution for institutions aiming to participate in this burgeoning sector. It caters to the growing demand for secure and compliant platforms and can potentially benefit various stakeholders. This move signifies Antier's strategic approach towards supporting institutional involvement in digital assets and aligning with regulatory frameworks, underscoring the importance of compliance in the rapidly evolving crypto industry landscape.

data.title: Abivax presents anti-fibrotic activity of Obefazimod at ECCO 2026, highlighting new clinical efficacy and safety analyses.
data.description: At ECCO 2026, Abivax revealed initial findings showcasing the anti-fibrotic effects of Obefazimod, combined with fresh evaluations on clinical effectiveness and safety in treating inflammatory bowel disease. The presentation highlighted significant progress, with promising results indicating Obefazimod's potential impact on fibrosis. This development marks a crucial advancement in the ongoing fight against inflammatory bowel disease, with key details outlined during the conference to provide a comprehensive overview.

data.title: India faces challenges in purchasing Russian oil due to pressure from heavy tariffs. Rejection may be awkward after complying.
data.description: The Prime Minister of India agreed to a significant number of President Trump's requests due to the imposition of high tariffs. It would be difficult to backtrack on these concessions at this point.

data.title: Feb 2026: QuickBooks named top bookkeeping tool for UK businesses by Better Business Advice, enhancing financial management.
data.description: In a recent report released on February 21, 2026, Better Business Advice reviewed the digital bookkeeping tools utilized by UK businesses in 2025. The assessment emphasized QuickBooks as a top choice for small and medium-sized enterprises due to its effectiveness in financial management and ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements. The report underscores the significance of digital solutions like QuickBooks in facilitating efficient operations within the UK business landscape.

data.title: Aritzia takes over iconic retailer Fred Segal in LA. Trendy brand becomes new owner of the renowned store.
data.description: The well-known retailer based in Los Angeles, formerly known as a key influencer of West Coast fashion, has been purchased by the popular mass-market brand Aritzia.

data.title: Behavioral scientist Dan Ariely from Duke University befriended Jeffrey Epstein for research; their correspondence continued for years.
data.description: A study conducted by Duke University's behavioral scientist, Dan Ariely, involved an extended exchange with a convicted sex offender. The prolonged communication between the two implies a relationship beyond professional matters, indicating a personal connection between them.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs in US see $3.8B outflows over five consecutive weeks as investors withdraw $315.9M last week amidst uncertainty.
data.description: For five consecutive weeks, US spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced outflows, with a total of $315.9 million being withdrawn last week. This trend indicates that institutional investors are reducing their risk exposure due to macroeconomic uncertainties.

data.title: New PureHealth Research supplements use Dandelion and Burdock Root to tackle swelling in lymphatic system; targets unexplained puffiness.
data.description: In a recent development from Manassas, Virginia on February 21, 2026, a new wellness solution has been introduced, utilizing a blend of Dandelion and Burdock Root in supplements aimed at supporting the lymphatic system. Termed as the "Flush and Filter" method by PureHealth Research, this innovative approach aims to combat unexplained puffiness commonly experienced by individuals. This new supplement targets swelling particularly in the hands, feet, and face, providing a holistic solution to this issue.

data.title: CHAI achieves $70M ARR with 3X annual growth rate, $1.4B valuation, focusing on AI safety in latest update.
data.description: In the last three years, our company has seen remarkable progress, maintaining a three-fold annual growth rate to hit $68 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) and attaining a valuation of $1.4 billion. This substantial growth necessitates a heightened level of accountability. While we are enthusiastic about the future opportunities, we are also mindful of the challenges that come with such rapid expansion.

data.title: Bitcoin's $150K predictions decrease, signaling a healthy shift in sentiment towards neutrality: Santiment.
data.description: Santiment reports that there has been a decrease in retail optimism towards Bitcoin. This shift in sentiment towards a more neutral stance may indicate a healthier market outlook. The change suggests a move away from extreme optimism or pessimism towards a more balanced view. This adjustment could lead to more stable price movements in the future.

data.title: Bitcoin miner MARA acquires 64% of AI data center company Exaion, diving into cloud services amid industry shift.
data.description: MARA has recently obtained a significant 64% share in Exaion, a computing infrastructure operator based in France. This move showcases MARA's expansion into the realms of artificial intelligence and cloud services. This strategic acquisition comes at a time when Bitcoin miners are shifting their focus towards generating revenue from data centers.

data.title: ALGO price expected to reach $0.11-$0.16 by March '26. Currently oversold at $0.09, RSI at 37.93 signals impending recovery.
data.description: An algorithmic analysis indicates that the price of a certain asset is currently at $0.09 and is considered oversold, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 37.93. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rebound to a range of $0.11-$0.16 within the next 4-6 weeks as Algorand faces important resistance levels.

Analysts predict that the price target for INJ will range between $3.50 and $4.00 within the next 4-6 weeks as various technical indicators are in alignment.

data.title: Yiwu's debut at 2026 Spring Festival Gala boosts tourism growth, continues to shine post-gala.
data.description: In Yiwu, China, on February 21, 2026, the Yiwu Media Convergence Center released a report detailing the impressive launch of the Yiwu sub-venue during the 2026 Spring Festival Gala on New Year's Eve. The event showcased "A Different Yiwu" on a global scale. This debut marked a significant turning point for the city, and the impact is expected to extend beyond the conclusion of the gala.

data.description: The cryptocurrency Curve (CRV) is currently valued at $0.24 and is showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) with bearish momentum. Analysts predict a possible price increase to the range of $0.30-0.35 if buyers manage to surpass important resistance levels.
